# Livepeer Docs

## Home

### Home / Home

- [Welcome to Livepeer Mission Control](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/home/mission-control): Livepeer powers on-demand real-time video streaming and AI pipelines through a full-stack open hardware network, providing users with affordable, verifiable, permissionless enterprise-grade softwar...
- [Get Started with Livepeer](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/home/get-started): A guide to getting started with the Livepeer ecosystem and network
- [Livepeer Primer](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/home/primer): A 10 minute primer on Livepeer, the community, the use cases, technology and where to get started

### Home / Livepeer

- [Livepeer Story](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/home/about-livepeer/vision): How Livepeer began with video streaming and grew to become the open AI-infrastructure for real-time Interactive Video & world models.
- [Livepeer Evolution](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/home/about-livepeer/evolution): A look at the Livepeer evolution from video to AI, to participatory governance and community driven development.
- [The Livepeer Advantage](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/home/about-livepeer/benefits): Livepeer offers an open, cost-effective, performant, and scalable trusted execution layer for the interactive AI-first internet.
- [Livepeer Organisational Structure](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/home/about-livepeer/ecosystem): A look at the Livepeer organisational structure, including the Livepeer Foundation, Livepeer Inc., and the key role of the Livepeer Community in governing the future of network.
- [What's Next for Livepeer?](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/home/about-livepeer/roadmap): What's next for Livepeer? A look at the Livepeer Foundation Roadmap - get involved!

### Home / Showcase

- [Creative Projects Built with Livepeer](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/home/solutions/showcase): Be inspired by this collection of creative ecosystem use cases re-inventing their industries with Livepeer.
- [Industry Verticals](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/home/solutions/verticals): Livepeer’s real-time open infrastructure is versatile enough to power use cases across multiple industry verticals.
- [Key Applications for Livepeer](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/home/solutions/applications): Key Applications of Livepeer from the hobby developer to the Fortune 500.

### Resource HUB



## About

### About Livepeer / About Livepeer

- [About Livepeer: Protocol & Network](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/portal): Welcome To The About Portal: Explore, Connect, Contribute
- [Livepeer Overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/livepeer-overview): An overview of the Livepeer protocol and network.
- [Livepeer Core Concepts](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/core-concepts): A high-level introduction to the key concepts and architecture of the Livepeer Real-time AI & Video Network
- [The Livepeer Stack and Mental Model](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/mental-model): A high-level introduction to the key concepts workings of the Livepeer open, on-demand AI & Media infrastructure substrate and the distributed crypto-primitive coordination system.

### About Livepeer / Livepeer Protocol

- [Protocol Overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/livepeer-protocol/overview): This section outlines the design, contract architecture, staking & reward mechanisms, incentive alignment and governance model of the on-chain Livepeer Protocol that governs how work is coordinated...
- [Core Mechanisms and Functions](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/livepeer-protocol/core-mechanisms): The Livepeer protocol secures a decentralised marketplace for verifiable media and AI compute through a tightly coupled set of economic and cryptographic systems. These mechanisms include LPT bondi...
- [Livepeer Token](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/livepeer-protocol/livepeer-token): Livepeer Token (LPT) is the native proof-of-stake token of the Livepeer network. It is the key to participating in the protocol: to operate or delegate in the transcoding network, to earn rewards,...
- [Livepeer Governance Model](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/livepeer-protocol/governance-model): This page describes the on-chain governance model which provides a permissionless, transparent, and community-driven framework for upgrading and governing the Livepeer protocol. It touches on the k...
- [Livepeer Treasury](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/livepeer-protocol/treasury): This page outlines how the treasury accumulates funds, how disbursements are authorised, and how its role is evolving across the protocol’s roadmap.
- [Livepeer Protocol Economics](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/livepeer-protocol/economics): Livepeer uses both its native token - LPT, and Ethereum (ETH) to power its network and compensate actors for their contributions. The Livepeer protocol uses a dynamic inflation rate and stake-for-a...
- [Technical Overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/livepeer-protocol/technical-architecture): A technical overview of the Livepeer protocol.

### About Livepeer / Livepeer Network

- [Livepeer Network Overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/livepeer-network/overview): An overview of the Livepeer network and its components.
- [Actors Overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/livepeer-network/actors): Who participates in Livepeer, what each role does, and how roles interact.
- [Livepeer Job Lifecycle](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/livepeer-network/job-lifecycle): This page describes the end-to-end “compute job” as a state machine. Since Livepeer’s compute is segment-oriented, the lifecycle is modelled at the level of a stream session and per-segment process...
- [Livepeer Marketplace](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/livepeer-network/marketplace): How the Livepeer Network marketplace matches demand and supply for real-time media compute: transcoding and AI inference, including routing, pricing, and settlement.
- [Network Technical Architecture](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/livepeer-network/technical-architecture): Technical stack of the Livepeer Network: node types, gateway infrastructure, APIs, CLI, SDKs, and monitoring. How orchestrators, gateways, and workers fit together.
- [Network Interfaces](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/livepeer-network/interfaces): How to interact with the Livepeer Network and protocol: REST and gRPC APIs, GraphQL, JS SDK, CLI, and smart contract interfaces.

### About Livepeer / Resources

- [Livepeer Whitepaper](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/resources/livepeer-whitepaper): Livepeer’s original whitepaper (published 2017) outlined an ambitious design for a fully decentralized live video streaming network. The goal was to build “the world’s open video infrastructure”, w...
- [Livepeer Glossary](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/resources/livepeer-glossary): A comprehensive glossary of terms used in the Livepeer Real-time AI & Video Network
- [Blockchain Contracts](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/resources/blockchain-contracts): An overview of the Livepeer protocol blockchain contracts.
- [Technical Roadmap](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/resources/technical-roadmap): Roadmap: https://blog.livepeer.org/introducing-livepeer-cascade-a-vision-for-livepeers-future-in-the-age-of-real-time-ai-video/
- [Gateways Vs. Orchestrators: What’s the Difference?](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/resources/gateways-vs-orchestrators): Livepeer uses two core node types-**Gateways** and **Orchestrators**-that work together to provide real-time AI video compute at scale. Although closely connected, they serve entirely different pur...

### Resource HUB



## Solutions

### Solutions / Use Livepeer

- [Livepeer Solutions Providers](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/portal): Welcome To The Solutions Portal: Explore, Build, Create
- [Developer Platform HUB](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/product-hub): Platforms & Products that make using Livepeer easy in your applications
- [Solution Providers](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/solution-providers): Ecosystem solution providers and products building on Livepeer.

### Solutions / Daydream

- [Daydream](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/daydream/overview): Open-source toolkit for world models and real-time AI video on the Livepeer network.

### Solutions / Livepeer Studio

- [Livepeer Studio overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/overview): Add live and on-demand video to your app with Livepeer Studio-APIs, dashboard, SDKs, and billing in one place.

### Solutions / Stream.place / Stream.place

- [How Streamplace Works](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/streamplace/introduction/streamplace-guide): A step-by-step explanation of ingest, segmentation, provenance, transcoding, and delivery.
- [Streamplace Architecture](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/streamplace/introduction/streamplace-architecture): Detailed architecture showing Streamplace, Livepeer, Orchestrators, provenance, and user layers.
- [Developer Integration Guide](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/streamplace/introduction/streamplace-integration): How to integrate Streamplace into decentralized social apps, Web3 platforms, and Livepeer-powered video pipelines.
- [Provenance & Metadata](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/streamplace/introduction/streamplace-provenance): How C2PA manifests, Ethereum signatures, and the Streamplace metadata schema create verifiable, rights-aware video.
- [SPE Funding Model](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/streamplace/introduction/streamplace-funding-model): Understanding Streamplace's role and responsibilities as a Special Purpose Entity (SPE) funded by the Livepeer ecosystem.

### Solutions / Stream.place

- [Streamplace Overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/streamplace/overview): What Streamplace is, why it exists, and how it fits into the Livepeer Network.

### Solutions / Embody Avatars

- [Embody Avatars](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/embody/overview): Embody Avatars is a Livepeer-powered platform for creating and sharing 3D avatars and virtual worlds.

### Solutions / Frameworks

- [Frameworks](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/frameworks/overview): Full-stack video infrastructure: open stack, live video processing, and flexible self-hosted or hosted deployments on Livepeer.

### Livepeer Studio Docs / Get started

- [Getting Started with Livepeer Studio](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/get-started/overview): Learn how to get started with Livepeer Studio
- [Quickstart](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/quickstart): Create an account, get an API key, and add live or on-demand video in under 5 minutes.
- [Authentication](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/get-started/authentication): Learn how to authenticate requests to the Livepeer Studio API
- [Studio CLI](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/get-started/studio-cli): Scaffold a new Livepeer app with the Livepeer Studio CLI.

### Livepeer Studio Docs / Livestream

- [Livestream overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/livestream/overview): Concepts for livestreams in Livepeer Studio: streams, sessions, ingest, playback, and health.
- [Create a livestream](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/livestream/create-livestream): Create a livestream with the Livepeer Studio API and get a stream key and playback ID.
- [Play a livestream](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/livestream/playback-livestream): Play livestreams in your app with the Livepeer Player or a custom HLS/WebRTC player.
- [Stream via OBS](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/livestream/stream-via-obs): Configure OBS Studio to stream into Livepeer Studio using RTMP and the stream key.
- [Livestream from browser](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/livestream/livestream-from-browser): Broadcast live from the browser using WebRTC and the Livepeer Broadcast component or custom WHIP.
- [Multistream](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/livestream/multistream): Send one livestream to multiple RTMP/RTMPS destinations (e.g. Twitch, YouTube).
- [Clip a livestream](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/livestream/clip-livestream): Create short clips from active livestreams using the Create Clip API.
- [Stream health](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/livestream/stream-health): Monitor livestream health: transcoding, real-time status, multistream targets, ingest rate, and logs.
- [Optimize latency](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/livestream/optimize-latency): Achieve low or ultra-low latency with WebRTC and HLS and tune OBS and in-browser broadcast settings.

### Livepeer Studio Docs / Video on demand

- [Video on demand overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/video-on-demand/overview): Concepts for VOD in Livepeer Studio: assets, playback, recordings, clips, and encrypted assets.
- [Upload an asset](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/video-on-demand/upload-asset): Upload video files to Livepeer Studio with TUS resumable uploads or PUT.
- [Play an asset](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/video-on-demand/playback-asset): Play VOD assets with the Livepeer Player or a custom HLS/MP4 player.
- [Encrypted assets](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/video-on-demand/encrypted-assets): Upload and play encrypted video with Livepeer Studio and control access.
- [Thumbnails (VOD)](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/video-on-demand/thumbnails-vod): Get thumbnails for video assets from the playback info API (WebVTT and keyframe images).
- [Transcode video](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/video-on-demand/transcode-video): Use the Transcode API to transcode video from and to S3-compatible storage (e.g. Storj, W3S).

### Livepeer Studio Docs / Access control & security

- [Access control overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/access-control/overview): Restrict playback for streams and assets with webhooks or JWTs.
- [Access control with webhooks](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/access-control/webhooks): Gate playback using a webhook that validates the viewer and returns allow or deny.
- [Access control with JWTs](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/access-control/jwt): Gate playback using signed JWTs so only viewers with a valid token can watch.

### Livepeer Studio Docs / Events & analytics

- [Webhooks](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/analytics/webhooks): Receive real-time events from Livepeer Studio (stream, asset, recording, multistream, task, access control).
- [Listen to events](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/analytics/listen-to-events): Use webhooks to react to stream and asset events (started, ready, failed, etc.).
- [Analytics](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/analytics/overview): Viewership and engagement metrics via the Livepeer API, Grafana, and Timeplus.

### Livepeer Studio Docs / Player & embed

- [Player and embed](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/player): Use the Livepeer Player component and the lvpr.tv embeddable player for playback.

### Livepeer Studio Docs / Reference

- [API overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/reference/api): Livepeer Studio REST API: authentication and basic usage.
- [API Reference](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/reference/overview): Complete API reference for Livepeer Studio endpoints
- [SDKs overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/reference/sdks): Server and client SDKs for the Livepeer Studio API: TypeScript, Go, Python, and React.
- [Managing projects](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/reference/managing-projects): Organize streams, assets, and API keys with Livepeer Studio projects (staging, production, multiple apps).

### Livepeer Studio Docs / API Reference / Assets

- [Assets API](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/assets/overview): The Assets API is used to create, retrieve, update, delete assets object from pipeline
- [Upload an asset](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/assets/upload): Upload a video or audio asset
- [Upload Asset via URL](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/assets/upload-via-url): Upload an asset by providing a URL
- [Retrieve an asset](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/assets/get): Get details about a specific asset
- [Update Asset](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/assets/update): Update an asset
- [Delete Asset](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/assets/delete): Delete an asset
- [Get All Assets](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/assets/get-all): Retrieve all assets

### Livepeer Studio Docs / API Reference / Streams

- [Streams API](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/streams/overview): The Livestream API is used to create, retrieve, update, delete stream object from pipeline
- [Create a livestream](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/streams/create): Create a new livestream
- [Retrieve a livestream](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/streams/get): Get details about a specific livestream
- [Get All Streams](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/streams/get-all): Retrieve all livestreams
- [Update Stream](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/streams/update): Update a livestream
- [Terminate Stream](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/streams/terminate): Terminate an active livestream
- [Create Clip](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/streams/create-clip): Create a clip from a livestream
- [Get Clip](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/streams/get-clip): Retrieve a clip from a livestream
- [Add Multistream Target](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/streams/add-multistream-target): Add a multistreaming target to a livestream
- [Delete Multistream Target](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/streams/delete-multistream-target): Remove a multistreaming target from a livestream
- [Delete Stream](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/streams/delete): Delete a livestream

### Livepeer Studio Docs / API Reference / Multistream

- [Multistream API](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/multistream/overview): The Multistream API is used to manage multistreaming targets
- [Create Multistream Target](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/multistream/create): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Get Multistream Target](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/multistream/get): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Get All Multistream Targets](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/multistream/get-all): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Update Multistream Target](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/multistream/update): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Delete Multistream Target](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/multistream/delete): Livepeer Studio API endpoint

### Livepeer Studio Docs / API Reference / Playback

- [Playback API](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/playback/overview): The Playback API is used to retrieve playback object from pipeline
- [Retrieve Playback Info](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/playback/get): Get playback information for a stream or asset

### Livepeer Studio Docs / API Reference / Sessions

- [Sessions API](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/sessions/overview): The Sessions API is used to retrieve session information
- [Get Session](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/sessions/get): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Get All Sessions](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/sessions/get-all): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Get Session Clip](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/sessions/get-clip): Livepeer Studio API endpoint

### Livepeer Studio Docs / API Reference / Tasks

- [Tasks API](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/tasks/overview): The Tasks API is used to monitor task status
- [Get Task](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/tasks/get): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Get All Tasks](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/tasks/get-all): Livepeer Studio API endpoint

### Livepeer Studio Docs / API Reference / Transcode

- [Transcode API](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/transcode/overview): The Transcode API is used for on-demand video transcoding
- [Create Transcode Job](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/transcode/create): Livepeer Studio API endpoint

### Livepeer Studio Docs / API Reference / Signing Keys

- [Signing Keys API](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/signing-keys/overview): The Signing Keys API is used to manage signing keys for secure playback
- [Create Signing Key](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/signing-keys/create): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Get Signing Key](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/signing-keys/get): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Get All Signing Keys](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/signing-keys/get-all): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Update Signing Key](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/signing-keys/update): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Delete Signing Key](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/signing-keys/delete): Livepeer Studio API endpoint

### Livepeer Studio Docs / API Reference / Webhooks

- [Webhooks API](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/webhooks/overview): The Webhooks API is used to manage webhook configurations
- [Create Webhook](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/webhooks/create): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Get Webhook](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/webhooks/get): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Get All Webhooks](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/webhooks/get-all): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Update Webhook](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/webhooks/update): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Delete Webhook](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/webhooks/delete): Livepeer Studio API endpoint

### Livepeer Studio Docs / API Reference / Rooms

- [Rooms API](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/rooms/overview): The Rooms API is used to manage WebRTC rooms
- [Create Room](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/rooms/create): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Get Room](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/rooms/get): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Delete Room](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/rooms/delete): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Create Room User](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/rooms/create-user): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Get Room User](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/rooms/get-user): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Update Room User](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/rooms/update-user): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Remove Room User](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/rooms/remove-user): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Start Room Egress](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/rooms/start-egress): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Stop Room Egress](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/rooms/stop-egress): Livepeer Studio API endpoint

### Livepeer Studio Docs / API Reference / Viewership

- [Viewership API](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/viewership/overview): The Viewership API provides analytics and metrics
- [Get Usage Metrics](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/viewership/get-usage-metrics): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Get Viewership Metrics](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/viewership/get-viewership-metrics): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Get Creators Metrics](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/viewership/get-creators-metrics): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Get Public Total Views](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/viewership/get-public-total-views): Livepeer Studio API endpoint
- [Get Realtime Viewership](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/solutions/livepeer-studio/api-reference/viewership/get-realtime-viewership): Livepeer Studio API endpoint

### Resource HUB



## Developers

### Developers / Building on Livepeer

- [Livepeer Developer Portal](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/portal): Welcome To The Developer Portal: Explore, Build, Create
- [Developer Journey](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/developer-path): Find your path on Livepeer - whether you want to build video apps, run AI pipelines, operate a gateway, or contribute to the protocol. Start here.

### Developers / Quickstart / Video & Transcoding

- [Video Quickstarts](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/quickstart/video/video-streaming): Quickstarts for Livepeer video workflows, including real-time video and transcoding jobs.
- [Transcoding Jobs Quickstart](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/quickstart/video/transcoding-jobs): Submit a Livepeer Studio Transcode job, poll the task status, and verify completion. Built from the GitHub-validated Studio OpenAPI spec and pending TD accuracy review.

### Developers / Quickstart / AI Jobs & Pipelines

- [AI Jobs & Pipelines Quickstart](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/quickstart/ai/ai-pipelines): Start here for Livepeer AI Jobs quickstarts and pipeline documentation.
- [AI Jobs Quickstart](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/quickstart/ai/ai-jobs): Send your first AI job to a Livepeer gateway using the AI API, with GitHub-validated endpoint references and a stakeholder signoff checklist.

### Developers / AI Pipelines

- [AI Pipelines Overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/ai-pipelines/overview): How Livepeer AI pipelines work: choosing between standard API endpoints, ComfyStream, and BYOC - with the right starting point for each use case.
- [ComfyStream](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/ai-pipelines/comfystream): ComfyStream integration with Livepeer: modular AI inference engine for video frame pipelines on GPU workers.
- [BYOC - Bring Your Own Container](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/ai-pipelines/byoc): Run custom AI models on Livepeer orchestrators via BYOC: architecture, implementation patterns, hard constraints, and step-by-step setup.
- [Is My AI Workload a Good Fit for Livepeer?](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/ai-pipelines/workload-fit): Decision framework for evaluating whether your AI workload belongs on Livepeer. Includes decision tree, capability matrix, gateway vs orchestrator responsibilities, and anti-patterns.
- [AI Model Support on Livepeer](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/ai-pipelines/model-support): Full compatibility matrix for AI model families on Livepeer via ComfyUI. Which models run, which are conditional, and which are incompatible - with reasons.

### Developers / Guides & Tutorials

- [Developer Guides](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/guides-and-tools/developer-guides): A curated library of how-to guides, tutorials, and walkthroughs for building with Livepeer — from first API call to production AI pipelines.
- [Resources](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/guides-and-tools/resources): A curated library of tools, dashboards, reading, videos, and reference material from across the Livepeer ecosystem.
- [Developer Help](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/guides-and-tools/developer-help): Every way to get help as a Livepeer developer — Discord channels, forum, office hours, GitHub issues, and more.
- [Contribution Guide](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/guides-and-tools/contribution-guide): How to contribute to Livepeer — code, documentation, governance, community support, and bug reports across all repositories.

### Developers / Builder Opportunities

- [Builder Opportunities](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/builder-opportunities/overview): Find grants, programmes, RFPs, treasury proposals, open source contribution pathways, and bug bounties for every type of Livepeer builder.
- [Grants & Programmes](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/builder-opportunities/grants-and-programmes): Livepeer funding opportunities for app builders, AI workflow creators, orchestrators, and research teams -- from microgrants to multi-month accelerator programmes.
- [RFPs & Treasury Proposals](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/builder-opportunities/rfps-and-proposals): Apply for Foundation-issued Requests for Proposals (RFPs) or submit a funded Special Purpose Entity (SPE) proposal to the Livepeer onchain treasury.
- [Open Source Contributions](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/builder-opportunities/oss-contributions): How to contribute to Livepeer's open source repositories -- from documentation fixes to protocol engineering -- including a guide to every core repo and its contributing process.
- [Bug Bounties](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/builder-opportunities/bug-bounties): Report smart contract vulnerabilities in the Livepeer protocol and earn USDC rewards through the official Livepeer bug bounty programme on Immunefi.

### Developers / Technical References

- [SDKs](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/technical-references/sdks): SDKs for Livepeer - Studio SDKs and Network SDKs
- [APIs](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/technical-references/apis): APIs for Livepeer - Studio API and Network APIs
- [Awesome Livepeer](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/technical-references/awesome-livepeer): View Awesome Livepeer on Github
- [Livepeer Wiki](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/technical-references/wiki): View the Livepeer Wiki on Github
- [DeepWiki](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/technical-references/deepwiki): DeepWiki is a fantastic resource for exploring the Livepeer codebase.

### Resource HUB

- [Tooling Hub](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/developer-tools/tooling-hub): Tools for building on Livepeer
- [Livepeer Explorer](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/developer-tools/livepeer-explorer): Monitor and manage your Livepeer network
- [Livepeer Tools Dashboard](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/developer-tools/livepeer-cloud): Livepeer Cloud
- [Community & Network Dashboards](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/developer-tools/dashboards): Monitoring and analytics tools for the Livepeer network

- [APIs](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/technical-references/apis): APIs for Livepeer - Studio API and Network APIs

- [Livepeer Wiki](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/technical-references/wiki): View the Livepeer Wiki on Github
- [DeepWiki](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/developers/technical-references/deepwiki): DeepWiki is a fantastic resource for exploring the Livepeer codebase.

### Changelog & Migrations

- [Documentation Changelog](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/changelog/changelog): This changelog tracks significant updates to the Livepeer documentation. For protocol changes, see the Livepeer Improvement Proposals (LIPs) and Livepeer Forum.

## Gateways

### Gateways / Gateway Knowledge Hub

- [Gateway Home Portal](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/gateways-portal): Welcome To The Gateway Portal: Explore, Navigate, Create
- [Gateway Explainer](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/about/explainer): Learn about the role of Livepeer Gateways in the Livepeer Network
- [Gateway Functions & Services](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/about/functions): This page describes the key functions and services provided by Livepeer Gateways and their marketplace role.
- [Gateway Architecture](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/about/architecture): This page describes the architecture of Livepeer Gateways.
- [Gateway Economics](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/about/economics): This page describes the payment flows and economics of Livepeer Gateways

### Gateways / Quickstart ⚡

- [Run a Gateway: Quickstart Guide](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/quickstart/gateway-setup): Get a Livepeer dual AI / video Gateway node up and running locally or on the Livepeer network.
- [Get AI to Setup the Gateway](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/quickstart/AI-prompt): This page is a downloadable task list for your AI coding agent to follow to set up your Livepeer Gateway for you - because who's got time for all that manual work?!

### Gateways / Public Gateways / Provider Docs

- [Using the Daydream Gateway](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/using-gateways/gateway-providers/daydream-gateway): Connect to the Daydream gateway to run real-time AI video pipelines on the Livepeer network - style transfer, image-to-video, StreamDiffusion, and more.
- [Using the Livepeer Studio Gateway](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/using-gateways/gateway-providers/livepeer-studio-gateway): Livepeer Studio is a hosted, production-grade gateway for live streaming and video-on-demand. Get a REST API, SDK support, and a management dashboard - no infrastructure to run.
- [Using the Cloud SPE Gateway](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/using-gateways/gateway-providers/cloud-spe-gateway): Livepeer.Cloud SPE provides free-to-use RTMP and AI gateways powered by the Livepeer network. Run by a Livepeer treasury-funded Special Purpose Entity - great for experimentation, OSS projects, and...

### Gateways / Public Gateways

- [Find Gateway Services](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/using-gateways/choosing-a-gateway): How to choose the right Livepeer gateway for your use case - whether you need a hosted service, a community gateway, or want to run your own.

### Gateways / Payments

- [Gateway Payments](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/payments/index): Payment setup for Livepeer gateways.
- [Payment Clearinghouse](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/run-a-gateway/payments/payment-clearinghouse): This page explains how to use the Livepeer Payment Clearinghouse to process payments for Livepeer Gateway services.

### Gateways / Run A Gateway / Quickstart

- [Run a Gateway: Quickstart Guide](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/quickstart/gateway-setup): Get a Livepeer dual AI / video Gateway node up and running locally or on the Livepeer network.
- [Get AI to Setup the Gateway](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/quickstart/AI-prompt): This page is a downloadable task list for your AI coding agent to follow to set up your Livepeer Gateway for you - because who's got time for all that manual work?!

### Gateways / Run A Gateway / Gateway Setup Guide / Setup Checklist

- [Gateway Node Requirements](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/run-a-gateway/requirements/setup): Learn about the hardware, network, and software requirements for running a Livepeer Gateway.
- [On-Chain Setup Requirements](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/run-a-gateway/requirements/on-chain setup/on-chain): This page will take you through setting up the additional requirements for running a Gateway in On-Chain mode including finding an RPC URL, and creating an Ethereum account and keystore.
- [Fund The Livepeer Gateway](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/run-a-gateway/requirements/on-chain setup/fund-gateway): The following steps will walk you through adding funds to your Gateway ETH account, including funding the ETH account on Ethereum Mainnet, bridging the funds to Arbritrum's L2 Network, and then usi...

### Gateways / Run A Gateway / Gateway Setup Guide / Installation

- [Installation Overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/run-a-gateway/install/install-overview): An overview of the installation process for Livepeer Gateways
- [Docker Install](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/run-a-gateway/install/docker-install): Install and run a Livepeer transcoding gateway using Docker
- [Linux Install](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/run-a-gateway/install/linux-install): How to install a Livepeer Gateway from source binary
- [Windows Install](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/run-a-gateway/install/windows-install): How to install a Livepeer Gateway using Windows
- [Easy Install [DevOps & Community Projects]](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/run-a-gateway/install/community-projects): Community CICD Pipelines to make installation accessible & easy

- [Discover Marketplace Offerings](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/run-a-gateway/connect/discover-offerings): This page explains how to discover AI & Video compute services offered by Orchestrators via your Gateway. for Livepeer Application consumption.
- [Discover & Connect Marketplace Compute Services](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/run-a-gateway/connect/connect-with-offerings): This page explains how to find and broker Orchestrator AI & Video Offerings via your Gateway for Livepeer Application consumption.

- [Run a Gateway](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/run-a-gateway/run-a-gateway): Connect Applications with Video & AI services by running your own Gateway! This page gives an overview of the steps to run a Gateway node.

- [Technical Architecture](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/technical-architecture): Technical Architecture Diagrams and References

### Gateways / Technical References / API Reference / AI API

- [AI API Portal](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/AI-API/ai): AI API Reference Portal - find all API endpoints and try them out here
- [Text To Image](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/AI-API/text-to-image)
- [Image To Image](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/AI-API/image-to-image): API reference for the image-to-image pipeline. Accepts an image and a prompt and returns a transformed image.
- [Image To Video](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/AI-API/image-to-video)
- [Upscale](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/AI-API/upscale)
- [Audio To Text](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/AI-API/audio-to-text): API reference for the audio-to-text pipeline. Accepts audio input and returns a transcript using Whisper-compatible models.
- [Segment Anything 2](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/AI-API/segment-anything-2)
- [Llm](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/AI-API/llm)
- [Image To Text](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/AI-API/image-to-text): API reference for the image-to-text pipeline. Accepts an image and returns a text caption or description.
- [Live Video To Video](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/AI-API/live-video-to-video)
- [Text To Speech](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/AI-API/text-to-speech)
- [Health](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/AI-API/health): API reference for the health endpoint. Returns the current operational status of a gateway node.
- [Hardware Info](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/AI-API/hardware-info): API reference for the hardware-info endpoint. Returns GPU and system hardware details for a gateway node.
- [Hardware Stats](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/AI-API/hardware-stats): API reference for the hardware-stats endpoint. Returns real-time GPU utilization and memory stats.

### Gateways / Technical References / API Reference / CLI HTTP API

- [CLI HTTP API API Portal](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/CLI-HTTP/cli-http-api): CLI HTTP API Reference Portal - find all CLI API endpoints here
- [Unbond](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/CLI-HTTP/unbond)
- [Rebond](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/CLI-HTTP/rebond)
- [Activateorchestrator](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/CLI-HTTP/activateorchestrator)
- [Setbroadcastconfig](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/CLI-HTTP/setbroadcastconfig)
- [Setmaxpriceforcapability](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/CLI-HTTP/setmaxpriceforcapability)
- [Reward](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/CLI-HTTP/reward)
- [Transfertokens](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/CLI-HTTP/transfertokens)
- [Signmessage](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/api-reference/CLI-HTTP/signmessage)

### Gateways / Technical References / Exchanges & RPCs

- [Livepeer Exchanges](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/livepeer-exchanges): List of exchanges that support Livepeer
- [Arbitrum Exchange Reference](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/arbitrum-exchanges): List of Exchanges that support Arbitrum One - dynamically fetched from CoinGecko
- [Arbitrum RPCs](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/gateways/references/arbitrum-rpc): List of Public Arbitrum RPCs

### Resource HUB



## GPU Nodes

### GPU Nodes / Orchestrator Knowledge Hub

- [Orchestrator Home Portal](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/orchestrators-portal): Welcome To The Orchestrator Portal: Explore, Earn, Operate
- [Orchestrator Journey](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/orchestrator-journey): Choose your path as a Livepeer orchestrator - run a full go-livepeer node or use a lightweight split setup
- [Orchestrator Explainer](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/about-orchestrators/overview): An orchestrator is a supply-side operator that contributes compute resources (predominately GPU resources) to the network. They receive jobs, perform transcoding or AI inference, and get compensate...
- [Orchestrator Functions](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/about-orchestrators/orchestrator-functions): Livepeer Orchestrators are both general purpose GPU compute providers, as well as economic actors that stake LPT, earn rewards, and vote in governance.
- [Architecture](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/about-orchestrators/architecture): Diagram: Orchestrator Architecture – the gateway assigns jobs to an orchestrator, which splits work to either a video transcoder process or an AI inference process running on its GPUs, then returns...
- [Orchestrator Economics](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/about-orchestrators/economics): The Livepeer Token (LPT) operates under a Stake-for-Access (SFA) model - common in DePIN networks, which requires node operators to stake LPT in order to participate, earn rewards and perform work...
- [Types of Orchestrator Jobs](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/about-orchestrators/job-types): Understand the differences between transcoding, realtime AI, and batch AI orchestrator configurations.

### GPU Nodes / Quickstart ⚡

- [Orchestrator Quickstart](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/quickstart/overview): Use this quickstart to choose the orchestrator workload you want to run.
- [Join a Pool](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/quickstart/join-a-pool): Contribute GPU capacity to an existing Livepeer orchestrator and earn rewards without running protocol infrastructure.
- [Transcoding Orchestrator Quickstart](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/quickstart/orchestrator-setup): Run go-livepeer as a transcoding orchestrator: create your wallet, configure your node, register, and verify.
- [Realtime AI Orchestrator Quickstart](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/quickstart/realtime-ai-quickstart): Setup path for realtime AI orchestrators on Livepeer (coming soon).
- [Batch AI Orchestrator Quickstart](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/quickstart/batch-ai-quickstart): Setup path for batch AI orchestrators on Livepeer (coming soon).

### GPU Nodes / Payments

- [Orchestrator Payments](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/payments/index): Payment setup guidance for Livepeer orchestrators.

### GPU Nodes / Run an Orchestrator / Orchestrator Setup Guide / Setup Checklist

- [Hardware Requirements](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/setting-up-an-orchestrator/hardware-requirements): Minimum, recommended, and production hardware for running a Livepeer orchestrator.

### GPU Nodes / Run an Orchestrator / Orchestrator Setup Guide / Installation

- [Orchestrator Stats and Monitoring](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/setting-up-an-orchestrator/orchestrator-stats): Monitor node health, GPU performance, and earnings with Prometheus and the Livepeer Explorer.

### GPU Nodes / Run an Orchestrator / Orchestrator Setup Guide / Configuration

- [Configure your Orchestrator](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/setting-up-an-orchestrator/setting-up-an-orchestrator/quickstart-add-your-gpu-to-livepeer): Configure go-livepeer after installation: Arbitrum connection, pricing, service address, and optional transcoding or AI config.

### GPU Nodes / Run an Orchestrator / Orchestrator Setup Guide

- [Setting up an Orchestrator](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/setting-up-an-orchestrator/overview): What it means to run an orchestrator and a setup checklist.

### GPU Nodes / Advanced Orchestrator Information

- [Orchestrator Earnings Explained](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/earnings): How orchestrators earn ETH fees and LPT rewards on Livepeer - fee types, reward calculation, commission parameters, and what affects your income.
- [Staking LPT](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/advanced-setup/staking-LPT): Why orchestrators stake LPT, how bonding works, and how stake affects video vs AI work.
- [Rewards and Fees](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/advanced-setup/rewards-and-fees): How orchestrators earn: LPT inflation rewards and ETH job fees; reward cut and fee share.
- [Delegation](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/advanced-setup/delegation): How delegators bond LPT to orchestrators and how to attract and retain delegators.
- [AI Pipelines](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/advanced-setup/ai-pipelines): Run AI inference on your orchestrator: enable AI, configure models, routing.
- [Hosting AI Models on an Orchestrator](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/advanced-setup/hosting-models): How to host AI models on a Livepeer orchestrator node: runtime setup, capability advertisement, pricing, and gateway integration. GPU operator guide.
- [Run a Pool](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/advanced-setup/run-a-pool): What an orchestrator pool is and how to run one: aggregate GPUs, set terms, and list your pool.

### GPU Nodes / Orchestrator Tools & Resources

- [Orchestrator Tools](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/orchestrator-tools-and-resources/orchestrator-tools): Explorer Cloud.tools
- [Community Orchestrator Pools](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/orchestrator-tools-and-resources/community-pools): This page is not reviewed or endorsed by the Livepeer team. It is a community effort to help GPU providers find pools to join. Please do your due diligence before joining any pool. See Join a Pool...
- [Orchestrator Guides](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/orchestrator-tools-and-resources/orchestrator-guides)
- [Orchestrator Resources](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/orchestrator-tools-and-resources/orchestrator-resources)
- [Orchestrator Community & Help](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/orchestrator-tools-and-resources/orchestrator-community-and-help)

### GPU Nodes / Technical References / Orchestrators

- [Orchestrator FAQ](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/references/faq): Frequently asked questions about running and operating Livepeer orchestrators.

### GPU Nodes / Technical References / API & CLI Reference

- [cli-flags reference](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/orchestrators/references/cli-flags): CLI flags and gRPC field mapping for go-livepeer orchestrators.

### Resource HUB



## LP Token

### Delegators & LPT / About LPT

- [LP Token Home Portal](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/token-portal): Welcome To The Token Portal: Explore, Navigate, Delegate, Vote
- [LPT Overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/about/overview): Comprehensive architectural and economic overview of the Livepeer Token (LPT) within the Livepeer Protocol.
- [Livepeer Token Purpose](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/about/purpose): Core purpose of LPT in Livepeer: protocol security collateral, reward distribution, and governance participation.
- [LPT Tokenomics](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/about/tokenomics): Formal economic model of LPT issuance, bonding dynamics, reward distribution, and security equilibrium.
- [LPT Mechanics](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/about/mechanics): Detailed protocol-level mechanics governing bonding, unbonding, reward checkpointing, and round-based state transitions in the Livepeer Protocol.

### Delegators & LPT / Delegating LPT

- [Delegating LPT: Getting Started](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/delegation/getting-started): How to delegate LPT to an orchestrator, earn rewards, and participate in Livepeer network security - a step-by-step guide for new delegators.
- [Delegation Overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/delegation/overview): Protocol-level overview of LPT delegation, including stake attribution, reward flows, and security implications.
- [Delegation Economics](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/delegation/delegation-economics): Interim overview of delegation economics and stake-weighted incentives for LPT delegators and orchestrators.
- [About Delegators](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/delegation/about-delegators): Formal definition, incentive role, rights/constraints, and risk model for delegators in the Livepeer Protocol.
- [Delegation Guide](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/delegation/delegation-guide): Contract-level, step-by-step guide to bonding, delegating, unbonding, rebonding, and verifying LPT delegation on-chain.

### Delegators & LPT / Livepeer Governance

- [Livepeer Governance Overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/governance/overview): Architectural and economic overview of stake-weighted governance in the Livepeer Protocol.
- [Livepeer Governance Model](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/governance/model): Formal model of stake-weighted governance, quorum mechanics, voting thresholds, timelock execution, and attack surface analysis.
- [Livepeer Governance Processes](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/governance/processes): End-to-end governance process lifecycle including off-chain signaling, LIP drafting, on-chain proposal execution, and treasury coordination.

### Delegators & LPT / Livepeer Treasury

- [Treasury Overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/treasury/overview): Formal model of the Livepeer Treasury as a governance-controlled protocol asset allocator.
- [Treasury Proposals](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/treasury/proposals): Formal structure and execution semantics of treasury proposals as governance-authorized on-chain actions.
- [Treasury Allocations](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/treasury/allocations): Allocation design, accounting model, evaluation framework, and verification/audit approach for governance-authorized treasury spending.

### Delegators & LPT / Guides & Resources

- [Delegator Videos and Blogs](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/resources/delegator-videos-and-blogs): Curated video and blog resources for delegators: staking tutorials, LPT delegation guides, and official links.
- [Exchanges with LPT Listed](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/resources/exchanges): A list of exchanges where the Livepeer Token (LPT) is listed. Note: this information is fetched from Coingecko weekly
- [LPT & ETH Token Functions](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/lpt/resources/lpt-eth-usage): What the LPT & ETH Tokens are used for in the Livepeer Protocol

### Resource HUB



## Community

### Community / Livepeer Community

- [Livepeer Community Portal](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/community/community-portal): Welcome To The Community Portal: Explore, Connect, Contribute
- [Community Guidelines](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/community/livepeer-community/community-guidelines): How we show up for each other - standards, conduct, and contribution norms for the Livepeer community.
- [Governance & the Livepeer Foundation](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/community/livepeer-community/governance-and-foundation): How Livepeer is governed, who the Livepeer Foundation is, how the treasury works, and how to participate in decisions that shape the network.
- [Trending Topics](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/community/livepeer-community/trending-topics): Trending Topics at Livepeer from across the forum, blogs and community.
- [What's Happening in Livepeer](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/community/livepeer-community/livepeer-latest-topics): Curated ecosystem highlights and a live feed of the latest topics from the Livepeer Forum.
- [Livepeer Foundation Roadmap](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/community/livepeer-community/roadmap): What's next for Livepeer? A look at the Livepeer Foundation Roadmap - get involved!

### Community / Livepeer Connect

- [Connect & Channels](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/community/livepeer-connect/forums-and-discussions): Where to find the Livepeer community - forums, Discord, Telegram, social media, and recurring community calls.
- [News & Socials](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/community/livepeer-connect/news-and-socials): Stay up to date with the latest news and socials from the Livepeer Community
- [Events & Live Streams](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/community/livepeer-connect/events-and-community-streams): Upcoming and past Livepeer community events and streams from the shared Livepeer calendar.

### Community / Livepeer Contribute

- [Contribute to Livepeer](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/community/livepeer-contribute/contribute): Help us build the future of open realtime AI & video - it takes a village!
- [Livepeer Opportunities](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/community/livepeer-contribute/opportunities): Current opportunities to participate in Livepeer through grants, programs, and community initiatives.
- [Build Livepeer](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/community/livepeer-contribute/build-livepeer): Ways builders can contribute code, tooling, and ecosystem projects to Livepeer.

### Community / Resources

- [Ecosystem Tools & Projects](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/community/resources/awesome-livepeer): A curated overview of community-built tools, dashboards, SDKs, and projects in the Livepeer ecosystem. The full list lives in the awesome-livepeer repository.
- [Community Guides](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/community/resources/guides): Guides, tutorials, and educational resources from the Livepeer community - covering delegation, orchestrator operation, gateway setup, and governance participation.
- [Dashboards](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/community/resources/dashboards): Community dashboards and analytics tools that help monitor ecosystem activity.

### Community / Help Center

- [Community FAQ](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/community/faq): Frequently asked questions about the Livepeer community, governance, ecosystem participation, and getting support.

### Resource HUB



## Resource HUB

### Resources / Resources

- [Resource Portal](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/resources-portal): Livepeer Resource Compendium
- [Contributing to the Livepeer Docs](https://docs.livepeer.org/contribute/CONTRIBUTING): Canonical contributor workflow for docs content, components, tooling, quality gates, and PR process.

### Resources / Documentation Guide / Component Library

- [Components Index](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/documentation-guide/component-library/overview): Aggregate inventory of repository components from snippets/components, generated for docs-guide maintenance.
- [Component Library](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/documentation-guide/component-library/component-library): Complete reference of custom components with live examples. This page provides a comprehensive reference for all custom components available in the Livepeer documentation. Each component includes a...
- [Primitives](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/documentation-guide/component-library/primitives): Basic UI building blocks used throughout the Livepeer documentation: buttons, icons, links, text, dividers, containers, tables, and layout utilities
- [Display Components](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/documentation-guide/component-library/display): Components for displaying media, visual content, and frame mode elements: video, images, embeds, quotes, carousels, diagrams, and social links
- [Content Components](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/documentation-guide/component-library/content): Components for displaying code, data, external content, and API documentation: code blocks, external content loaders, API response fields, version displays, and data layouts for blogs, forums, and...
- [Layout Components](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/documentation-guide/component-library/layout): Components for organizing and structuring content on the page: cards, lists, steps, tables, grids, and text layouts
- [Integration Components](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/documentation-guide/component-library/integrations): Components that integrate with external services and APIs: CoinGecko exchange data, social media integrations, and other third-party service connectors
- [Domain Components](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/documentation-guide/component-library/domain): Components specific to Livepeer documentation domains: Gateway, Portal, and Shared components including callouts, quickstart UI, hero sections, and preview indicators

### Resources / Documentation Guide

- [Documentation Overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/documentation-guide/documentation-overview): This page outlines the ethos, objectives & features of the docs, giving you a clear navigational roadmap
- [Guide To Using The Documentation](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/documentation-guide/documentation-guide): This guide will help you navigate and make the most of the Livepeer documentation site.
- [Features and AI Integrations](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/documentation-guide/docs-features-and-ai-integrations): The Livepeer documentation includes several powerful features designed to enhance your experience and make information more accessible.
- [Documentation Style Guide](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/documentation-guide/style-guide): Style guide, Mintlify gotchas, and best practices for writing Livepeer documentation
- [Snippets Folder Inventory](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/documentation-guide/snippets-inventory): This page provides a comprehensive inventory of all files and folders in the `/snippets` directory. The snippets folder is the central location for all custom components, data, scripts, and assets...
- [Contribute To The Docs](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/documentation-guide/contribute-to-the-docs): Contribute to the Livepeer documentation and help us make it even better!
- [Automations & Workflows Guide](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/documentation-guide/automations-workflows): Complete guide to all automation scripts, GitHub Actions workflows, n8n automations, and pre-commit hooks in the Livepeer documentation repository

### Resources / Livepeer Concepts

- [Livepeer Core Concepts](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/core-concepts): A high-level introduction to the key concepts and architecture of the Livepeer Real-time AI & Video Network
- [Livepeer Glossary](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/livepeer-glossary): A comprehensive glossary of terms used in the Livepeer Real-time AI & Video Network
- [Actors Overview](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/about/livepeer-network/actors): Who participates in Livepeer, what each role does, and how roles interact.

- [Livepeer Glossary](https://docs.livepeer.org/v2/resources/livepeer-glossary): A comprehensive glossary of terms used in the Livepeer Real-time AI & Video Network
